## Epic 3 — Skills & Talents (#34)

**Dependency:** #32
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Design the talent/ability framework — how non-skill character features work in the DP economy.

### Framework
- **Talents:** Passive benefits or at-will abilities (e.g., "Tough" adds +1 HP per level, "Alert" gives initiative bonus)
- **Abilities:** Active powers with specific triggers (e.g., spells, combat maneuvers, social tricks)
- **Cost:** 1 DP (Novice), 2 DP (Adept), 4 DP (Master) — same as skills
- **Dice Prerequisites:** Most talents/abilities require specific dice types
- **Chains:** Some abilities form chains (Novice → Adept → Master) like spell chains

### Design Questions
- Are talents and abilities purchased from the same DP pool as skills?
- Can you "skip" tiers (buy Master directly if you have the DP and dice)?
- Are there class-exclusive talents?
- Do ancestries grant any free talents?

### Tasks
- [ ] Define talent categories (Combat, Social, Exploration, Magic, General)
- [ ] Define ability categories (Arcane Spells, Divine Prayers, Combat Maneuvers)
- [ ] Design 10-15 general talents (available to all classes)
- [ ] Design 2-3 class-exclusive talents per class
- [ ] Write talent/ability creation guidelines for DAs
- [ ] Create talent reference tables
